message:
test(harness): update symbol latency baseline thresholds and measurement data

Raise minimum threshold assertions to match updated ingestion coverage:
- raw_p50 minimum raised from 9 to 12 to reflect additional thread-local
  capture samples now included in raw ingestion.
- updated_modes minimum raised from 33 to 36 after adding thread capture
  mode rows to the ingestion pipeline.

Update conformance baseline JSON and sample log with latest measurement
data from the expanded symbol latency profiling runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
